name: Glades Town Park
description: Glades Town Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Oakland, MD. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Grantsville Town Park
description: Come play pickleball at Grantsville Town Park in Grantsville, MD! There are 8 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.
hours: Monday – Friday: 8 AM to 4 PM (Excluding Holidays) Follow Copyright 2026 Town of Grantsville & Greater Grantsville Business Association. Site via Slight Revision. Notice of Non-Discrimination X

name: Oakland Community Center
description: Come play pickleball at Oakland Community Center in Oakland, MD! There are 3 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. A one-time fee is required to play.
fees: Fee required — $5 per session, or $40 per month
